name: Turso
description: Turso is an edge-hosted distributed database built on libSQL (a SQLite fork). Use this API to manage databases, groups, organizations, and generate authentication tokens for your Turso databases.

capabilities.name: manage_databases
capabilities.description: Create, list, get details, and delete databases in your Turso organization.

capabilities.name: manage_groups
capabilities.description: Create and manage database groups that control replication regions.

capabilities.name: create_database_token
capabilities.description: Generate authentication tokens for connecting to a specific database.

capabilities.name: manage_organizations
capabilities.description: List and manage organizations, members, and invitations.

capabilities.name: get_database_stats
capabilities.description: Retrieve usage statistics and metrics for your databases.
